unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Computer
title: Maps and Navigation
drDigitalIntro: Maps and Google Maps help you find directions, explore places, and plan trips. Search for an address or a business name to get turn-by-turn directions. Maps works on your phone for navigation while driving. On your computer, you can plan a route and send it to your phone with one tap. You can also search for restaurants, gas stations, or pharmacies near you.

playgroundTask.instructions: Practice navigating to Maps online. Type the address in the browser bar.

drDigitalSuccess: You navigated to maps.google.com — Maps is available in your browser too, not just on your phone!
drDigitalHint: Type maps.google.com in the address bar and press Enter or Go.
